User.title: User
User.description: Represents an individual associated with New Era University (NEU), including students, faculty, employees, librarians, and administrators. This entity stores their institutional details and role within the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

institutionalEmail.description: The official NEU institutional email address of the user. This is used for login via Google-based authentication and serves as a unique identifier for the user.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

idNumber.description: The unique identification number assigned by NEU (e.g., student ID, employee ID).

college.description: The college or department within NEU that the user is affiliated with (e.g., CICS, Education, Nursing, Arts, Engineering, Business).

program.description: The specific academic program or course of study the user is pursuing (e.g., BSIT, BSCS, BSME). This property may be null for faculty, employees, librarians, or administrators not currently enrolled in a program.

role.description: The role of the user within NEU and the application system. This determines their categorization and access privileges.

isActive.description: A flag indicating whether the user's account is currently active. If 'false', the user is considered blocked and cannot log visits or access administrative features.

createdAt.description: The date and time when this user record was first created in the system.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when this user record was last updated.

Visit.title: Visit
Visit.description: Records a single instance of a user visiting the NEU Library, capturing the purpose of their visit and the precise entry time.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Visit entity.

visitorEmail.description: The institutional email of the visitor.

visitorId.description: Optional reference to the User entity (UID) if the user was authenticated.

purpose.description: The primary reason or activity for the user's visit to the library.

entryTime.description: The precise date and time when the user checked into the library.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles, identified by their Firebase Authentication User ID. Contains institutional details and their current status. Users can read their own profiles. Admins have read, create, update, and delete access for account management.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication User ID (UID) of the user.

definition.description: A collection where the existence of a document signifies 'admin' privileges for the associated userId. Only existing admins can create or delete documents in this collection.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication User ID (UID) of the user who holds the 'admin' role.

definition.description: A collection where the existence of a document signifies 'librarian' privileges for the associated userId. Only existing admins can create or delete documents in this collection.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication User ID (UID) of the user who holds the 'librarian' role.

definition.description: Records individual library visits. Authenticated NEU staff can view logs, while any student with an NEU email can create a record.

params.name: visitId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific library visit.
